entries.name: King Oleb XVI
entries.note: Cunning ex-pirate patron; Shakespearean bluster over a patient plan; favour strong.

entries.name: Princess Rao
entries.note: Heir; invented the privateer scheme (now vindicated); her own gated agenda.

entries.name: Reyna Voss
entries.note: Crew XO / First Pilot / Face; Shake's ex-Navy comrade; Drinaxi noble w/ court access (Leadership 2, Persuade 2).

entries.name: Doc Hadrian
entries.note: Medic/Steward; exiled Imperial surgeon; wry fellow exile (Medic 3).

entries.name: Dak Surrow
entries.note: Pilot/Astrogator/Sensors; quiet, precise, superstitious about the jump drive.

entries.name: Mira Kell
entries.note: Chief Engineer; blunt, straight-talking; loyalty earned by honesty (Engineer 2).

entries.name: Brakk
entries.note: Lead Gunner / boarder; big, hot-tempered, fiercely loyal (Gunner 2).

entries.name: Sal Quist
entries.note: Boarder / QM / 2nd gunner / fence; watchful, mercenary-charming; works every angle (Streetwise 2).

entries.name: Krrsh
entries.note: Vargr pilot/gunner/comms rescued at Borite; not bright, broken, devoted to Shake; knows the Theev routes.

entries.name: Sir Coriol Tashan
entries.note: Star Guard captain (Wrax's client); lost the wager, rivalry defused to grudging respect; gave public endorsement.

entries.name: Captain Edda Korr
entries.note: Master of the free trader Larkspur (Borite); rescued by the crew; grateful contact/intel in the Sindal backwater.

entries.name: Provost Martial Haddo Farx
entries.note: Torpol starport admin; ambitious; now a firm champion/Asset lobbying Torpol toward Drinax.

entries.name: Keeper Malos
entries.note: Psychopomp death-priest & Clarke starport admin; won by honesty; personal ally; holds Drinax to 'actions, not words'.

entries.name: Admiral Darokyn
entries.note: SECRET (crew-only): Imperial Naval Intelligence deep-cover running Theev; wants Ferrik silent; proof on his flagship. Conditional friendship.

entries.name: Miria Silverhand
entries.note: Released cyber-armed merc; baited Ferrik then freed (Cr50k). Out of the picture but knows the crew's faces — could resurface.

entries.name: Capt. Danel Vlaw
entries.note: Paranoid Asiman trader (Sarcomond, Torpol); hates Drinax, warmed to Shake as a fellow Imperial. Minor goodwill.

entries.name: Matron Sera Avelline
entries.note: Paal: pro-Drinax old-blood council matron; allied freely; Drinax's foothold inside the oligarchy.

entries.name: Magnate Ivo Sarrel
entries.note: Paal: centrist swing-bloc leader, WON by Shake's pitch (conditional); fears Prison/vassalage & Waste/being spent. Avelline+Sarrel = majority in waiting.

entries.name: The Pirate Lords of Theev
entries.note: Gated power players of the lawless pirate port of Theev.
